location: A floor pickup at the back of a side room in Taylew's Ruined Forge, a small optional dungeon in Ancient Ruins of Rauh, guarded by a Golem-type enemy rather than a boss fight.

source.name: floor pickup, Taylew's Ruined Forge (guarded by a Golem)

tactics: From the Taylew's Ruined Forge grace, follow the path forward to a gap and jump across it rather than dropping down
Take the small room on the left where the Golem stands guard — the axe sits at the back of that room
No boss and no NPC here — this dungeon holds three different Smithscript weapons total, so keep exploring after grabbing this one
As a Smithscript weapon it launches a returning projectile on charged/jumping heavy attacks and cannot take buff-granting Ashes of War or consumable buffs
lore: Etched with a smithing script and built as a throwing weapon rather than a conventional melee tool, this axe is credited to Taylew, the ruined forge's golem-smith deity, rather than ordinary blacksmithing.

builds.name: Str/Dex quality-thrower
builds.why: D/D physical scaling lets it work as a normal axe while its heavy attacks add a returning ranged option at no extra investment

builds.name: Occult Arcane bleed/ranged
builds.why: Reforging to Occult affinity grants B-rank Arcane scaling, letting an Arcane-bleed build add a thrown option without sacrificing melee damage
